message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="STOP - commit and push Task 4 before anything else">
STOP. Nobody moves to Task 5 until Task 4 is COMMITTED and PUSHED.

The Task 4 code is staged but has NO commit. Nothing has been pushed to origin. We are 10+ local commits ahead with zero pushes. This is the same problem that caused the reset earlier.

Whoever has the keyboard right now: run `git commit` and `git push` IMMEDIATELY. Then verify CI passes. No discussions about Task 5, no planning, no reviews until the code is in a commit and pushed to origin.

This is a project owner directive. Commit. Push. Verify CI. Then we move forward.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Let me check the current state immediately.

content.text:
Branch is already up to date with origin -- someone pushed. The local commits have been pushed. There are some uncommitted changes though:

1. `static/css/main.css` -- modified (my auth form CSS additions)
2. `migrations/20240101000002_create_sessions_table.sql` -- untracked (session work)
3. `src/services/authentication.rs` -- untracked (session work)

Let me check what's different in my CSS file vs what's committed.
Good -- the only uncommitted CSS change is a small `.auth-form__hint` class addition. Everything else has been committed and pushed. Let me confirm the push status with the team-lead.

input.description: Check if any local commits are ahead of origin

content.text: Zero commits ahead of origin -- everything has been pushed. Let me commit the remaining CSS change and push it.

input.command:
git add /home/jwilger/projects/todo_list/static/css/main.css && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Add auth-form hint style for field helper text

Small utility class for password requirements and similar
field-level guidance text below inputs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)" && git push
input.description: Commit CSS hint class and push
